title: avena lendigera
intro: Avena lendigera, also known as oat grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. Avena lendigera is believed to have various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting relaxation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote a restful night's sleep.
